info.title: Air Task Backend API
info.description: REST API для управления проектами и недельными задачами с интеграцией Planka

tags.name: Completed Weekly Task Management
tags.description: API for completed weekly task management

get.description: Returns weekly task with specified ID

put.description: Updates weekly task information with specified ID

delete.description: Deletes weekly task with specified ID

put.description: Updates project information with specified ID

post.description: Creates a new weekly task in the system
Updates task information with the specified ID
Creates a new task in the system
Updates an existing reminder. Returns 404 if the reminder is not found, 400 if validation fails.

404.description: Reminder not found with the specified ID

post.description: Creates a new reminder in the system. Returns 400 if validation fails.
Refreshes the updated timestamp of an existing reminder. Returns 404 if the reminder is not found.

404.description: Reminder not found with the specified ID

post.description: Updates purchase information with the specified ID
Creates a new purchase in the system
Creates a new project in the system
Marks a weekly task as completed
Authenticate with login and password to get a JWT token

get.description: Returns a list of all weekly tasks in the system

delete.description: Deletes the task with the specified ID

get.description: Returns a list of all tasks in the system
Returns the list of all reminders in the system.
Returns the list of reminders with calculated time remaining before each event.

200.description: List of reminders with time before event successfully retrieved

delete.description: Deletes the purchase with the specified ID

get.description: Returns a list of all purchases in the system
Returns a list of all categories in the system

200.description: List of purchases categories successfully retrieved

get.description: Returns a list of all projects in the system

get.summary: Get completed weekly task by ID
get.description: Returns completed weekly task with specified ID

delete.description: Deletes completed weekly task with specified ID

get.description: Returns statistics for weekly tasks completion
Returns a list of all completed weekly tasks

delete.description: Deletes a reminder by its ID. Returns 404 if the reminder is not found.

404.description: Reminder not found with the specified ID

WeeklyUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating a weekly task

id.description: Unique identifier of the weekly task

priority.description: Priority level of the weekly task

projectName.description: Name of the project this weekly task belongs to

WeeklyResponse.description: Response body containing weekly task details

id.description: Unique identifier of the weekly task

count.description: Count or quantity for the weekly task

createdTs.description: Timestamp when the weekly task was created

updatedTs.description: Timestamp when the weekly task was last updated

WeeklyCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating a new weekly task

count.description: Count or quantity for the weekly task

projectName.description: Name of the project this task belongs to

reminderDateTime.description: Date and time when the reminder should trigger
Date and time when the reminder should trigger

createdTs.description: Timestamp when the reminder was created

updatedTs.description: Timestamp when the reminder was last updated

CreateReminderRq.description: Request to create a new reminder

reminderDateTime.description: Date and time when the reminder should trigger

RefreshReminderRq.description: Request to refresh a reminder's updated timestamp

CompletedWeeklyResponse.description: Response body containing completed weekly task details

id.description: Unique identifier of the completed weekly record

weeklyEntityId.description: Reference to the original weekly task

completedDate.description: Date when the task was completed

createdTs.description: Timestamp when the completed record was created

updatedTs.description: Timestamp when the completed record was last updated

BeforeReminderRs.description: Response containing reminder information with days remaining before the event

reminderDateTime.description: Date and time when the reminder triggers

daysBeforeEvent.description: Number of days remaining before the event

WeeklyTaskStatisticsResponse.description: Response body containing weekly task statistics

totalWeekly.description: Total count across all weekly tasks

WeeklyWithCompletionStatus.description: Weekly task with completion status details

weeklyTaskId.description: Unique identifier of the weekly task

requiredCount.description: Required count for the weekly task

completedCount.description: Number of times the task was completed

remainingCount.description: Remaining count to complete the task

completedToday.description: Whether the task was completed today
